description: Add a new product category called 'Seasonal Items' in Chromis POS. The application is open showing the main POS screen. You need to: (1) Navigate to the Stock/Maintenance panel (accessible via the back-office or admin menu), (2) Open the Categories management section, (3) Create a new category named 'Seasonal Items', (4) Save the new category. The database currently has 11 product categories from the UCI Online Retail Dataset (e.g., Kitchen & Dining, Bags & Accessories, Lighting & Candles). After adding 'Seasonal Items', there should be 12 categories.
